issues.title: Build Better Beads Smithers verification loop
issues.description:
## Outcome
Better Beads can prove whether the Smithers strict-polish workflow improves an open Beads graph before implementation dispatch.

## Closure contract
Do not close this parent until the result extraction, weak-graph fixture, and operator policy children are closed or explicitly closed as unnecessary with evidence.

## Success criteria
- The Smithers polish wrapper can recover or clearly explain the final synthesis result.
- A weak open-graph fixture exercises `needs_mutation` rather than only the all-closed graph path.
- Operator docs explain how to interpret Smithers verdicts before dispatch.

## Validation
```bash
br dep cycles --json
bash skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh smithers
bash skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh
```
Expected: no dependency cycles; default evals remain offline; Smithers fixture catches weak graph readiness mistakes.

## Non-goals
- Do not auto-apply Smithers recommendations through `br`.
- Do not make Smithers mandatory for normal Better Beads use.
- Do not run live Smithers evals in default CI or hooks.

## Failure behavior
If Smithers cannot provide a parseable result, the wrapper must expose inspect/chat/log commands and return a precise `result_error` rather than silently marking the graph ready.

issues.title: Stabilize Smithers polish result extraction
issues.description:
## Outcome
`better-beads smithers polish-graph --json` reliably returns the final polish plan when the Smithers run succeeds, or a precise extraction error when it cannot.

## Success criteria
- Preserves the `better-beads-smithers-polish-graph-v1` envelope.
- Extracts a final result only when it matches the polish plan schema.
- Handles direct output rows, nested output rows, `null` output, and malformed output.
- Includes inspect, chat, logs, output, and scores commands when extraction fails.

## Validation
```bash
bash skills/better-beads/scripts/test_schemas.sh smithers
bash skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh smithers
skills/better-beads/scripts/better-beads smithers polish-graph --json
```
Expected: fake happy paths return `result.verdict`; live or simulated extraction failures return a useful `result_error` with follow-up commands.

## Non-goals
- Do not change the workflow into an applying/mutating workflow.
- Do not parse scores into the envelope unless the result extraction contract is already stable.

## Failure behavior
Malformed or absent Smithers output must be diagnostic, not silent; the command must not report ready when no schema-valid result was found.

## Anchors
- `skills/better-beads/scripts/better-beads`
- `skills/better-beads/schemas/better-beads-smithers-polish-graph-v1.schema.json`
- `skills/better-beads/scripts/test_schemas.sh`
- `skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh`

issues.title: Add weak open-graph Smithers verification fixture
issues.description:
## Outcome
Better Beads has an offline default eval that proves Smithers does not mark a deliberately weak open graph as ready.

## Success criteria
- Adds a small fixture with one parent and three children.
- Fixture includes at least one missing failure-behavior case, one vague validation case, and one dependency or shared-surface ambiguity.
- Default eval path uses fake Smithers/Bun and does not call the network.
- Optional live path is explicit and cannot run by accident.

## Validation
```bash
bash skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh smithers
bash skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh
```
Expected: default evals pass offline and fail if the Smithers fixture verdict is incorrectly `ready`.

## Non-goals
- Do not mutate the caller's live `.beads` graph from evals.
- Do not require live model calls for default validation.

## Failure behavior
If fake Smithers returns `ready` for the weak fixture, the eval must fail with the fixture id and expected verdict.

## Anchors
- `skills/better-beads/evals/run_evals.sh`
- `skills/better-beads/evals/README.md`
- `skills/better-beads/test/fixtures/`
- `skills/better-beads/smithers-templates/better-beads-polish-graph.eval.jsonl`

issues.title: Document Smithers polish operator policy
issues.description:
## Outcome
Operators know when to run Smithers, how to interpret verdicts, and how to proceed without confusing advisory model output with graph authority.

## Success criteria
- Documents that deterministic gate errors still block dispatch.
- Documents that `needs_mutation` requires manual review and mutation or explicit rejection before dispatch.
- Documents that `blocked` is expected when no open work exists.
- Documents that Smithers `ready` is advisory and does not auto-apply `br` mutations.
- Mentions live runs are not pre-commit hooks.

## Validation
```bash
rg -n "needs_mutation|recommendation-only|dispatch" skills/better-beads/references skills/better-beads/evals
```
Expected: policy is discoverable from the Better Beads references and eval docs.

## Non-goals
- Do not add a new workflow.
- Do not make Smithers mandatory.

## Failure behavior
If result extraction remains unstable, docs must say how to inspect `smithers chat`, `smithers inspect`, `smithers logs`, and scores manually.

## Anchors
- `skills/better-beads/references/SMITHERS-POLISH-GRAPH.md`
- `skills/better-beads/references/MODE-POLISH-EXISTING-GRAPH.md`
- `skills/better-beads/evals/README.md`
